took: One-question-at-a-time interview methodology; agent recommends an answer for each; prefer codebase exploration over asking when the answer is in the code.

Three-criteria rule for ADRs (hard-to-reverse + surprising + real trade-off); discipline of offering ADRs sparingly; CONTEXT.md compatibility stub format; challenge-fuzzy-language and stress-test-with-scenarios sharpening discipline.

Self-contained single-file HTML artifacts with no daemon, no build step; copy-to-clipboard feedback as the durable export mechanism. Anchor-into-clipboard pattern adapts this: instead of a copy-export button at the end, each annotatable region has an anchor button that copies a markdown reference the user pastes into a sidecar feedback.md.
